messages.text: Vhalgrimm rises from its throne and the whole scorched circle erupts, a scourging storm of embers and grave-ash that flays you. The blow {verb} you!
Vhalgrimm looses its cinder scourge across the black glass and you dive behind a leaning shard as the firestorm roars past.
Vhalgrimm's cinder scourge catches you in the open and the searing ash strips you to the bone! The blow {verb} you!
